title: Susam Pal
notes: Built Wander, which I like for the same reason I like blogrolls: it gives discovery a shape without turning it into a platform.

title: CogDogBlog
notes: Restlessly handmade. Good at making the web feel like something you can still tinker with directly.

title: Beto Dealmeida
notes: Human-scale web experiments and the kind of sidecar thinking that makes sites more legible.

title: Jeremy Keith
notes: One of the steadier reference points for ordinary web craft, durability, and publishing with conviction.

title: Jamie Tanna
notes: Consistently useful technical writing with a strong sense that personal sites can be practical, not just ornamental.
